upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal strictly weakens the parent first-stage no-defiers premise to bounded defier mass, adds q_N/q_A feasibility, and gives an explicit kappa=0 parent reduction.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance/v2: sharp memory-retaining dynamic IV bounds under q_F=0

published_prior_art.cite: Noack2021: static monotonicity-violation sensitivity indexed by defier share

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance/v2 is only the q_F=0 parent corner; no other catalogue entry has bounded-defier retained-memory prism

published_prior_art.cite: Noack2021/DeChaisemartin2017/DahlHuberMellace2023 are static defier-tolerant IV results, not dynamic retained-memory branch equations

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dynamic_iv_compliance/v2 has strict memory gain only at q_F=0, not a bounded-defier absorption threshold

published_prior_art.cite: DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 gives generic discrete sharp-bounds machinery; BugniGaoObradovicVelez2024 is static CAR ATE/ATT, neither states a retained-memory defier threshold

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define kappa^dagger over the full endpoint-optimal face, not a singular optimizer, so Conjecture 2 remains unambiguous under LP degeneracy.
Add a small two-stage binary numerical witness showing the retained-memory endpoint is strict below kappa^dagger and equal above it.
State the aggregate-prism optimization as an explicit fractional/linear program after Charnes-Cooper normalization to handle kappa-dependent complier weights cleanly.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with the threshold definition tightened for optimizer degeneracy.
